code:
from fastapi import FastAPI, Query
from typing import Optional

app = FastAPI()

@app.get("/items/")
async def read_items(
    q: Optional[str] = Query(
        None,
        min_length=3,
        max_length=50,
        title="Query string",
        description="Search query for items",
        alias="item-query",
        regex="^item.*"
    ),
    item_id: int = Query(
        ...,
        gt=0,
        le=1000,
        description="The ID of the item to retrieve",
        example=123
    ),
    price: float = Query(
        10.0,
        gt=0.0,
        description="Price of the item"
    ),
    limit: int = Query(
        10,
        ge=1,
        le=100,
        description="Number of items to return"
    )
):
    results = {"item_id": item_id, "price": price, "limit": limit}
    if q:
        results.update({"q": q})
    return results
prompt: FastAPI ile query parameters validation yaz.
